name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram is a global money transfer service with 29+ locations across Cleveland offering domestic and international fund transfers through partner retailers like Walmart, CVS, and Ace Cash Express.
description_long:
MoneyGram is an established money transfer company that operates through a network of retail partner locations rather than standalone branches. The company enables customers to send and receive money domestically and internationally by leveraging existing storefronts in convenience stores, pharmacies, and retailers. According to their website, MoneyGram has built a distributed network of service points designed for accessibility and convenience.

MoneyGram's core offerings center on money transfer services. Customers can initiate transfers online or visit physical locations to send funds, with the flexibility to manage transactions through multiple channels. The service is available at 29 documented locations in the Cleveland area alone, with partnerships spanning major retailers including Walmart, CVS, and specialized check-cashing outlets like Ace Cash Express and Quick Shop Food Mart. Operating hours vary by location but extend into evening hours, with some locations open until 11:59 PM.

What distinguishes MoneyGram is its partnership-based distribution model, which provides wider geographic coverage than traditional standalone financial institutions. By embedding services within existing retail footprints, the company reduces overhead while maximizing accessibility. The multi-channel approach—allowing both online transaction initiation and in-person completion—adds flexibility compared to purely brick-and-mortar competitors.

MoneyGram's primary limitation is that it functions as a money transfer service provider rather than a full-service financial institution. Users cannot open deposit accounts, obtain loans, or access traditional banking products. The website content does not disclose fee structures, exchange rates, or transfer speed guarantees, making cost comparison difficult for consumers. Additionally, the distributed partner model means service quality and customer experience may vary significantly by location.
pros: 29+ convenient locations across Cleveland area for in-person access
Partnership with major retailers (Walmart, CVS) increases accessibility without requiring separate branch visits
Extended operating hours with some locations open until 11:59 PM for after-hours access
Dual-channel capability allowing online transaction initiation or fully in-person handling
Established international money transfer capability mentioned on website
Multiple payment methods available through diverse partner locations including specialty check-cashing retailers
Simple location search feature on website by address, city, state, or ZIP code
cons: No fee or pricing information disclosed on the location finder page, making cost comparison impossible
Service limited to money transfers only—cannot open accounts, deposit funds, or access credit products
Service quality and experience varies significantly depending on host retailer partner
Website content does not specify transfer speeds, limits, or delivery timeframes
No standalone branches; dependent on third-party retailers who may have conflicting priorities
best_for: Individuals needing to send or receive money domestically or internationally with flexible scheduling
People without bank accounts or who prefer cash-based transactions with retail accessibility
Consumers who want evening/extended-hours money transfer options near retail destinations they already visit
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need to send/receive money conveniently through retail locations with flexible hours. The primary caveat is that this is a transaction-specific service only—it does not provide banking, credit, or account-holding capabilities, and detailed pricing information is not available on their consumer-facing website.
services: In-person cash pickup for received transfers
Service availability at Ace Cash Express outlets
Service availability at independent convenience stores
Evening and extended operating hours at select locations
